notes.C7: Approach 3 ('Tree-Sitter as Optional Enhancement Layer') is a non-obvious architectural proposal: using tree-sitter as a post-regex second pass triggered only when regex flags candidates. This requires understanding the scanner dispatch model from reading the code, not from the issue text. The cons correctly identify the flaw in this architecture, showing genuine synthesis.
